privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: This Privacy Policy explains how information is collected, used, and protected when you visit this website.
privacyPolicy.questions: If you have questions about this policy, you can contact me through the contact form available on this website.
privacyPolicy.collected: This website collects limited information in the following ways.

privacyPolicy.used: This information is used only to respond to your inquiry and discuss potential collaboration or services.
privacyPolicy.notUsed: The information is not used for marketing purposes, newsletters, or shared with third parties.

privacyPolicy.cookiesDisabled: You can disable cookies through your browser settings if you prefer not to allow them.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies Policy
cookiesPolicy.description: This Cookies Policy explains how cookies are used on this website and how you can control them.
cookiesPolicy.whatAreCookiesDescription: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites function properly and provide information about how visitors interact with the site.
cookiesPolicy.howThisWebsiteUsesCookiesDescription: This website uses cookies only for basic functionality and website analytics.
cookiesPolicy.analyticsCookiesDescription: This website uses Google Analytics to understand how visitors use the website. These cookies collect information such as
cookiesPolicy.dataCollected: This data is collected in an aggregated and anonymous form and is used only to improve the website and user experience.
cookiesPolicy.thirdPartyCookiesDescription: Google Analytics may set cookies on your device. These cookies are managed by Google and are subject to Google's privacy policies.
cookiesPolicy.thirdPartyCookiesLearnMore: You can learn more about how Google uses data here
cookiesPolicy.managingCookiesDescription: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or delete cookies that have already been stored.
cookiesPolicy.disablingCookiesMayAffect: Please note that disabling cookies may affect how some websites function.
cookiesPolicy.changesToThisCookiesPolicyDescription: This Cookies Policy may be updated from time to time. Any updates will be posted on this page with a revised date.
cookiesPolicy.contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Cookies Policy, you can contact the website owner through the contact form available on this website.

hero.title: About Me
hero.subtitle: I’m a Frontend Developer and Product Designer who builds modern web applications with a strong focus on usability, performance, and clean architecture.
hero.description: With a background in both design and engineering, I bridge the gap between visual creativity and technical execution. My goal is simple: create digital products that are beautiful, intuitive, and scalable.
hero.works: I work with companies and startups around the world to transform ideas into high-quality web experiences — also helping women launch tech careers through Tech Beach Mama.

background.title: My Background
background.description: My path into tech started from the design side.
background.description2: I began my career working with graphic design and user experience, helping brands communicate visually and craft better digital products. Over time, I became increasingly interested in the technical side of building those experiences.
background.description3: That curiosity led me to transition into frontend development, where I could combine design thinking with engineering.
background.description4: Today, I specialize in building modern web applications with React and Next.js, focusing on performance, scalability, and exceptional user experience.
background.description5: With experience working in professional development teams and delivering production-ready applications, I understand what it takes to build software that is not only visually polished but also maintainable and reliable.

whatIDo.title: What I Do
whatIDo.description: I help companies design and build modern digital products.
whatIDo.workFocus: My work focuses on three areas:
whatIDo.fastBuilding: Building fast, scalable, and maintainable web applications using modern technologies.
whatIDo.intuitiveDesign: Designing interfaces that are intuitive, elegant, and user-focused.
whatIDo.designDrivenDevelopmentDescription: Combining design and development to create products where form and function work together seamlessly.

approach.title: My Approach
approach.description: I believe great digital products are created when design and engineering work together from the beginning.
approach.iFocusOn: Instead of simply implementing designs, I focus on solving real product problems and building experiences that users actually enjoy using.
approach.alsoPassionateAbout: I’m also passionate about building reusable UI systems and scalable frontend architectures.

quote.description: Ideas bloom where the mind wanders, not just where the screen glows.

contact.description: If you’re looking for a developer who understands both product design and frontend engineering, I’d love to hear about your project.

experience.title: My long experience counts on
experience.scalableWebApplications: years of Building scalable web applications

techBeachMama.title: Beyond client work
techBeachMama.description: I’m also building Tech Beach Mama — a platform where I help women, especially single mothers, transition into tech and build independent, flexible careers.
techBeachMama.description2: It’s where I share my journey, resources, and practical guidance for creating a life with more freedom.
techBeachMama.linkText: → Learn more about Tech Beach Mama

hero.title: My services
hero.subtitle: Frontend Development & UI Design. I help businesses build fast, scalable, and beautifully designed web experiences.
hero.description: I help you bring your ideas to life with a clean design and reliable frontend development — creating websites and applications that are both beautiful and built to perform.

cards.title: What I can help you with
cards.description: I combine frontend development, UI design, and product thinking to create digital experiences that are both beautiful and built to perform.

process.title: My process
process.description: My process is simple and straightforward. I follow a step-by-step approach to build your project.

steps.discoveryDescription: Understanding your goals, audience, and vision to define the right direction.
steps.designDescription: Creating intuitive layouts and a visual identity that reflects your brand.
steps.developmentDescription: Building a fast, scalable, and reliable product using modern technologies.
steps.launchDescription: Testing, refining, and launching your project with performance in mind.

quote.description: I combine engineering precision with design intuition — so your product not only works, but feels right.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Invest in a fast, scalable, and beautifully designed web experience.
pricing.description: Every project is tailored to your goals — these are starting points to give you an idea.

offers.landingPagesDescription: Perfect for campaigns, products, or personal brands that need to convert visitors into customers.
offers.websitesDescription: Modern, responsive websites built with performance, scalability, and user experience in mind.
offers.customAppsDescription: Tailored solutions for more complex needs — built to scale with your business.

pricing.designAndDevelopment: Design + development in one place — no need to hire multiple people.

hero.title: Selected Work
hero.subtitle: A selection of projects where I’ve combined frontend development, UI design, and product thinking to build modern, high-performing web experiences.
hero.description: Each project reflects my approach to creating digital products that are not only visually refined, but also scalable, intuitive, and built with performance in mind.

techBeachMama.title: Tech Beach Mama
techBeachMama.description: Tech Beach Mama is a high-converting website built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI. It combines modern web design with strategic marketing to inspire single mothers to build profitable tech careers by the beach.

sculptedGoddess.title: Sculpted Goddess
sculptedGoddess.description: Rebuilding and modernising a data-heavy SSR web application from Python/Flask to Next.js for performance, maintainability, and scalability.

cgConsulting.title: CG Consulting
cgConsulting.description: A complete redesign and platform migration for a Spanish HR consultancy — from a fragile WordPress setup to a fast, bilingual Next.js web app with Sanity CMS, built to last without ongoing maintenance costs.

hero.subtitle: From WordPress to a scalable, high-performance web architecture
hero.description: A complete redesign and rebuild of a consulting website, focused on performance, maintainability, and a clean, professional user experience. Many small businesses rely on WordPress setups that become fragile over time. This project shows how migrating to a modern stack can reduce long-term risk while improving performance and flexibility.

step1.label: The Problem
step1.title: A WordPress site held together by fragile plugins
step1.textItem1: CG Consulting is a boutique HR services firm helping international companies find talent in Spain.
step1.textItem2: The existing WordPress website had served the business for years but had become increasingly fragile due to plugin dependencies and lack of ongoing maintenance. They needed a stable, professional digital presence that could be managed without relying on a developer for day-to-day updates — in both Spanish and English.
step1.textItem3: The goal of this project was not only to redesign the website, but to rebuild it on a modern, scalable architecture that removes technical risk and supports future growth.

challenges.title: The main challenge was not the platform itself, but the long-term sustainability of the existing setup.
challenges.frequentIssues: Frequent issues caused by plugin updates
challenges.difficultContentManagement: Difficult content management for the client

step2.label: Design Concept
step2.title: Starting with design, not code
step2.textItem1: The redesign centered on clarity and credibility — the two things an independent HR consultant needs to communicate immediately. I focused on a clean visual hierarchy, structured content presentation, and a layout that feels professional without being cold. Subtle animations and transitions, built with Framer Motion, add movement and polish to the experience without pulling attention away from the content. The site is fully responsive, designed to feel equally trustworthy on mobile and desktop.
step2.caption: Redesign concept — Figma

step3.label: Migration & Architecture
step3.title: Moving from WordPress to a modern stack
step3.textItem1: I proposed a full platform migration from WordPress to a modern Next.js + Sanity CMS stack. The goal wasn't just a technical upgrade — it was to give the client genuine ownership of their content and confidence that their site wouldn't break without a developer on call.
step3.textItem2: Since CG Consulting works with international companies to source talent in Spain, the site needed to speak to two audiences. Full bilingual support in Spanish and English was built in from the start.

solution.title: I rebuilt the website using a modern, lightweight architecture focused on simplicity and control.
solution.introducedStructuredContent: Introduced structured content via Sanity CMS
solution.builtCustomFrontend: Built a custom frontend for full control over performance and design
solution.addedSubtleAnimations: Added subtle animations to enhance the user experience

step3.whyTechStack: Chosen for performance, flexibility, and long-term maintainability.

step4.label: The Live Site
step4.title: Design in the browser — desktop & mobile
step4.textItem1: The redesigned site live — clean layout, professional credibility, and a fully responsive experience across all devices.
step4.caption: The redesigned site live — clean layout, professional credibility, and a fully responsive experience across all devices.

step5.label: Performance
step5.title: From slow to fast — measurable results
step5.textItem1: Performance and SEO improvements are not tied to a specific framework, but to how the application is built. In this project, the improvements came from simplifying the architecture, reducing dependencies, and optimizing the implementation.
step5.textItem2: Note: WordPress can absolutely deliver excellent performance and SEO when built with a clean architecture and minimal dependencies. In this case, the chosen approach prioritized long-term stability, performance control, and a simplified maintenance experience for the client.

after.title: After
after.fullControlOverFrontendAndContent: Full control over frontend and content

step5.alt: Lighthouse performance scores — WordPress before vs Next.js after
step5.caption: Performance · WordPress vs Next.js (Lighthouse)

step6.label: Client Handoff
step6.title: CG Consulting can manage their own content — no developer needed
step6.textItem1: Sanity CMS was configured to give the client a clean, simple editing interface. They can update their services, copy, and contact info without touching code — no developer required after launch.
step6.alt: Sanity Studio content management interface for CG Consulting
step6.caption: Content management · Sanity Studio

step7.label: The Outcome
step7.title: A stable, bilingual web app built to last
step7.textItem1: The client went from worrying about plugin conflicts to having full control over her content through a clean CMS interface. The new site is significantly faster, far more stable, and built on a foundation that can scale as her business does — without depending on a developer for day-to-day updates.
step7.textItem2: This project reflects how I approach client work: solving a real business problem, not just building a website.

myRole.title: I handled the project end-to-end — from design and structure to development and deployment.

finalCta.title: Looking to modernize your website or improve performance?
